extortion.description: Urban Import was established in 2001 by fellow automotive enthusiasts to provide customers with an unrivaled selection of top quality aftermarket automotive parts. After cementing our presence as an eBay Power Seller, we launched our first online retail site carrying some of the top performance brands of the time. As the aftermarket performance industry began to boom, Urban Import focused on expanding its lineup by securing exclusive distributorship of the D2 Racing brand in North America....
